CustomField.description: Used for 'Budget Category Detail - Actual Amount' DLRS rollup criteria
CustomField.formula: (Activity_Type__c != 'Program Reporting' || Activity_Type__c != 'Income' || Activity_Type__c != 'Recapture' || Activity_Type__c != 'Expense Report') && (FA_Status__c = 'Approved' || FA_Status__c = 'Processing' || FA_Status__c = 'Scheduled' || FA_Status__c = 'Paid')
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Rollup to 'Budget Category Detail - Actual Amount' (DLRS) when equal to True
CustomField.label: BCD Rollup
